summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: Candlestick chart, Shareholders history, and Supply Chain for DAX/FTSE stocks. Backend: 100% pass (13/13 tests). Frontend: All new features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 for European stocks (MC.PA, VOW3.DE, HSBA.L, BP.L) - expected as options data typically not available for non-US stocks

issues: Shows 'No options data available' for European stocks - normal behavior

passed_tests: API /api/shareholders/MC.PA/history - Returns 9+ history records with Famille Arnault data (Q1-Q4 2024)
API /api/shareholders/VOW3.DE/history - Returns history records with Porsche-Piëch family and Qatar Investment Authority
API /api/shareholders/HSBA.L/history - Returns history records with Ping An Insurance and BlackRock
API /api/shareholders/BMW.DE/history - Returns history records with Quandt/Klatten family
API /api/shareholders/UNKNOWN999/history - Returns empty history for unknown symbols (graceful handling)
API /api/supplychain/BMW.DE - Returns supply chain nodes (CATL, LG Energy Solution, Bosch)
API /api/supplychain/SAP.DE - Returns supply chain nodes
API /api/supplychain/HSBA.L - Returns supply chain nodes (IBM)
API /api/supplychain/BP.L - Returns supply chain nodes
API /api/supplychain/MC.PA - Returns supply chain nodes (Loro Piana, Sephora, Tiffany)
API /api/shareholders/MC.PA - Returns shareholders data with insiders%, institutions%, major_holders
API /api/shareholders/HSBA.L - Returns shareholders data
API /api/market/history/MC.PA - Returns OHLC data (open, high, low, close, volume) for candlestick charts
UI Line/Candles toggle buttons visible and functional
UI Candlestick chart displays green (bullish) and red (bearish) candles correctly
UI Line chart displays area chart with gradient fill
UI Major Shareholders section displays pie chart and holder list
UI History button toggles to show shareholding changes over time
UI Shareholders history shows quarterly data (2024-Q1 to 2024-Q4) with percentage changes
UI Supply Chain section shows suppliers and customers with risk levels
UI Period buttons (1D, 5D, 1M, 3M, 1Y, 5Y) work correctly
UI Technical Analysis section displays RSI, MACD, SMA, Bollinger Bands

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all candlestick, shareholders history, and supply chain features working)

seed_data_creation: None - uses MOCKED/STATIC shareholders history data for ~10 European companies
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features fully tested: 1) Candlestick chart (Line/Candles toggle) works for all stocks with OHLC data. 2) Shareholders history shows quarterly shareholding changes for ~10 major European companies (MC.PA, VOW3.DE, BMW.DE, HSBA.L, etc.). 3) Supply chain data available for DAX (BMW.DE, SAP.DE) and FTSE (BP.L, HSBA.L) stocks. History data is MOCKED/STATIC in server.py SHAREHOLDERS_HISTORY dict.

mocked_apis_list: /api/shareholders/{symbol}/history - Static data for ~10 European companies (MC.PA, VOW3.DE, BMW.DE, GLE.PA, HSBA.L, AIR.PA, RMS.PA)
mocked_apis.note: Shareholders history uses static data from SHAREHOLDERS_HISTORY dict in server.py. Supply chain data is also static but more comprehensive.

features_verified.candlestick_chart: Working - Line/Candles toggle switches between area chart and candlestick chart with proper OHLC rendering
features_verified.shareholders_history: Working - History button toggles between current shareholders and historical changes view
features_verified.shareholders_history_data: Working - Shows quarterly data (2024-Q1 to 2024-Q4) with holder name, percent, and change values
features_verified.supply_chain_dax: Working - BMW.DE shows CATL, LG Energy Solution, Bosch; SAP.DE has supply chain data
features_verified.supply_chain_ftse: Working - BP.L has oil services suppliers; HSBA.L shows IBM
features_verified.pie_chart_shareholders: Working - Displays pie chart with color-coded holder types (family, government, institutional, corporate)
